title: Butter's Sport Balls
description: Adds balls from different sports to minecraft
body:
I will add different things from different sports via request

List of current sports:

Basketball ![Basketball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf63771a418275d840cd9d30100d9c3bf9b0b775_0.webp)

The basketball is usable with right click

Hoops will never be added unless highly requested, its  better to use hoppers as a hoop. The closest thing ill make is a hopper like block that spits items out immediatly 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

American Football ![Football](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9ea6396acea0ef3a15aa2d0dce24f9296c1a88b.png)

The football is the same as the basketball but you can throw it further and it has a different throwing animation

I do have plans for football helmets in the future

------------------------------

This mod is only available on modrinth and curseforge

If there is a bug please let me know at https://discord.gg/r4tYFTsskq
